title: Nix's Fancy Skeletons
description: Remodeled Skeletons to have a clothing layer.
body:
**Requires Optifine or EMF+ETF to work!**

**About**

I always found it funny how the Stray and more recently the Bogged have some form of clothing while the original 2 Skeletons are bare bones.

Well I decided that this inconsistency bugs me enough to make a resource pack about it! Now Skeletons have hoods like an archer and Wither Skeletons have rusty old armor!\
_[Disclaimer: armor too rusty to provide actual armor points]_

This pack was originally developed for my modpack, any updates going forward will most likely be for the purposes of my modpack first. (assuming I update this pack at all)\
Theoretically this pack supports any version as long as you have a custom entity model mod but I'm too lazy to check that.

Heavily inspired by the changes done to the skeletons in the [Fearsome Foes](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fearsome-foes/) resource pack by GiratinaLuigi!


**Additional Stuff**

The Wither Skeletons are renamed to the Withered for consistency with the other mob variants.

Skeletons have 3 variants in the Nether, 2 generic ones and 1 for the Soul Sand Valley!\
Nether variants support mob spawning in the biomes of Jaden's Nether Expansion and Gardens of the Dead. More support will be added in the future but in the meantime you can add them yourself for other mods!\
If you don't want these variants you can download the files labeled as "noNether" instead!


 

Feel free to use in your own projects!

You can find me on Discord (myrusen) and Twitter (@stellers1145)!
